title: Top Tractor and Farm Machinery Repair YouTube Channels
description: 29-channel tractor repair leaderboard (fetched 2026-07-12): subscriber counts, video totals, public-contact stats.
answer_first: This July 12, 2026 ranking covers 29 tractor repair channels with a combined 1,265,600 subscribers. Restore & Repair leads on 501,000; the median sits at 3,780, and 6 of 29 channels list a public business contact. Snapshot number 1 landed 2026-07-12 with 29 channels; week-over-week changes start with the next refresh. The channel-by-channel table - subscribers, videos, country, public contact - follows.
rows: James Connolly Machinery and Tractor Videos
facts: Combined audience: 1,265,600 subscribers across the 29 ranked channels (2026-07-12).
Subscribers range up to 501,000 (Restore & Repair); the median channel counts 3,780.
6 of 29 ranked channels advertise a public business contact (aggregate only - no addresses shown).
8,413 videos have been published across all 29 ranked channels.
More channels are based in United States than anywhere else - 14 of 29.
Dataset baseline: 29 channels at first capture on 2026-07-12.

faq.a: By automated keyword discovery for 'tractor repair' during the 2026-07-12 run - no manual curation. Every one of the 29 channels shown carries its public subscriber, video, and country data.

faq.q: Why are there no email addresses in the table?
faq.a: By design - the table shows a yes/no public-contact flag and nothing more (6 of 29 say yes). Address-level data is left to the source actor, which only returns what creators publish.

faq.q: How spread out are the subscriber counts?
faq.a: Widely: from 501,000 at the top down past a median of 3,780 across 29 channels. The ranking table shows the full curve.

faq.q: Is this snapshot or live data?
faq.a: It is a dated snapshot from 2026-07-12 of live public counts, covering 29 channels. The page is rebuilt on a schedule, so the URL stays stable while numbers update.
